flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Columbia Basin College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.2k vs 5.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Columbia Basin College rose 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.0k → $14.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Columbia Basin College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.5k → $8.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Columbia Basin College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.8k → $6.6k).
